subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! These are my hands; I have lifted them up to receive the descent of Thy mercy. These are my feet
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی ان هذا ایدای قد ارفعتها لنزول رحمتک و ان هذا رجلای قد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @love of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @station of the Manifestation of God
